approved.note: Bearer API-key auth (team.api_key / team.public_api_key via validateTeamApiKey). Enrolls an existing contact into a campaign.
Bearer API-key auth (team.api_key / team.public_api_key via validateTeamApiKey). Creates-and-enrolls a contact in one call.

Bearer API-key auth (validateTeamApiKey against teams.api_key). Creates a contact with custom properties; optional campaignId triggers a best-effort background enrollment. Overlaps with contact-enrollments (create-and-enroll); accepts the private api_key only.
